original_text: On November 12, 2025, American Express expanded its small business support initiatives with a new $5 million Amex Shop Small Grants Program, building on its Small Business Saturday platform created in 2010. The company also announced a content partnership with creator and small business advocate Keith Lee, and is providing free customized signage for small businesses. Additionally, American Express presented at the KBW Fintech Payments Conference 2025 on November 12, 2025, where management discussed strategic priorities with investors.
revised_text: On November 12, 2025, American Express expanded its small business support initiatives with a new $5 million Shop Small Grants Program, building on its Small Business Saturday platform created in 2010. Additionally, American Express presented at the KBW Fintech Payments Conference 2025 on November 12, 2025.
changes_summary: Removed the unsupported claim regarding a content partnership with Keith Lee and free customized signage, as the evidence chunk (C006) was truncated and did not contain these details. Retained the claims regarding the $5 million Shop Small Grants Program, Small Business Saturday history, and the KBW Fintech Payments Conference presentation, as these were explicitly supported by chunks C006 and C007. Removed the specific detail about management discussing strategic priorities to ensure all claims are strictly supported by the provided text.
